use_cases: Interactive button for triggering actions in web applications
Form submission and user interaction handling
Multi-variant button system with consistent styling
Accessible button component with Radix UI Slot composition
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Provides standard accessibility features including focus-visible states and disabled state handling. Designed for general-purpose interactive UI controls across various interface contexts.
